title: Calcite Crafting Recipes
description: Vanilla/survival friendly ways of obtaining calcite by crafting and smelting.
body:
## About
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e870808059a8a60f770427151f2dd014f4fa7b9.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d42d2d14ed4317b0524ce06594f53b7eb363008.png)

You can now make fully auotmatic calcite farms by hooking this up to a dripstone farm, or a bartering farm for quartz combined with diorite farm!

Lightweight datapack adding smelting and crafting recipes for obtaining Calcite! The block serves a good building tool for white color schemes, but is currently rare and only forms underground or in sparse mountain strips.

## Recipes
Smelting
- Dripstone in real life is related to Calcite, so why not make it smeltable into Calcite!

Crafting
- Using real life as a guide and other existing crafting recipes for stone type blocks
- Use diorite combined with bone meal
